Manager_Name: The name of the Information Security Manager who established the digital signage preventive maintenance schedule.
Schedule_Established_Date: The date when the digital signage preventive maintenance schedule was established.
Maintenance_Protocol: Details of the maintenance protocol established for digital signage.
Digital_Display_Unit_Count: The number of digital display units covered under the established maintenance protocol.
Maintenance_Frequency: The frequency of the established maintenance protocol, such as weekly, monthly, quarterly, etc.
